hooks.command: node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c).on("end",()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=(j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.command)||"";if(/\bgit\s+push\b/.test(cmd)){console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",permissionDecision:"ask",permissionDecisionReason:"Push to a remote detected — confirm per the standing no-auto-push rule (prefer /ship)."}}));}}catch(e){}})'

node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c).on("end",()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=(j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.command)||"";const m=cmd.match(/functions\s+deploy\s+([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+)/);if(m){const fn=m[1];console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:"Edge function \""+fn+"\" was just deployed. VERIFY IT BOOTED: call the Supabase MCP get_logs tool (service=edge-function) for project yluyonhrxxtyuiyrdixl, scan the last ~60s for BOOT_ERROR / uncaught exceptions / 5xx, and hit any smoke or health path. The deploy is NOT done until logs are clean."}}));}}catch(e){}})'
